dashboards.name: Network Ops
dashboards.description: Hourly network traffic and tower load. Data updates as Airflow lands each UTC partition.

cards.description: Voice, SMS, and data event counts by UTC hour.

cards.description: Average data usage per seeded subscriber, including subscribers with no data events.

cards.description: Event mix by weekday/weekend classification from the date dimension.
